basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has released the official Assistant Professor (Contract Basis) Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing a Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks along with NET/ SLET/ SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations are eligible to apply online. Interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 15 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks, NET/ SLET/ SET or Ph.D as per UGC Regulations
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University. Must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or similar test like SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D as per UGC Regulations. Ph.D must meet specific conditions: awarded in regular mode, thesis evaluated by two external examiners, open viva voce conducted, two research papers published (at least one in refereed journal), two papers presented in conferences/seminars. Desirable: Computer programming skills using SPSS/R/Python/SAS etc. and Ph.D.

salary_details.details: For Ph.D holder - Rs. 47,000/- per month For rest of the contract teachers - Rs. 45,000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUSAT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUSAT Assistant Professor (Contract basis) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University. Must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or similar test like SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D as per UGC Regulations. Ph.D must meet specific conditions: awarded in regular mode, thesis evaluated by two external examiners, open viva voce conducted, two research papers published (at least one in refereed journal), two papers presented in conferences/seminars. Desirable: Computer programming skills using SPSS/R/Python/SAS etc. and Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Salary 2026
content_sections.text: For Ph.D holder - Rs. 47,000/- per month For rest of the contract teachers - Rs. 45,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (Contract basis) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 15 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor (Contract basis) position at CUSAT.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 950 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 195 for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 47,000 per month, depending on the qualification (Ph.D. holders receive Rs. 47,000).

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based position at Cochin University of Science and Technology.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official CUSAT website.

faq.question: Q9. Does CUSAT offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include computer programming skills using SPSS/R/Python/SAS etc., and a Ph.D.
